title: isaura
preparations: Isaura has many herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which have been used for various medicinal purposes. Isaura tea has been traditionally used to alleviate digestive issues and soothe inflammation in the stomach, while also being used as a calming agent to aid in sleep. Isaura tincture, on the other hand, is often used as a topical application to reduce pain and inflammation in the muscles and joints, as well as being used orally to boost the immune system. Additionally, Isaura infusion has been used to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory issues such as congestion and coughing.
